api.name: synthesize
api.signature: synthesize(config: 'str | Path | dict[str, Any] | None' = None, out: 'str | Path' = 'data/synth', n_users: 'int | None' = None, seed: 'int | None' = None, n_workers: 'int' = 0, write_report: 'bool' = True, **overrides: 'Any') -> 'dict[str, Any]'

api.name: tokenize
api.signature: tokenize(data_dir: 'str | Path', out: 'str | Path', config: 'str | Path | dict[str, Any] | None' = None, tokenizer_dir: 'str | Path | None' = None, max_users: 'int | None' = None, rows_per_shard: 'int' = 4096, n_workers: 'int' = 0) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
api.summary: Fit (or load) the tokenizer and write tokenized parquet shards + index.

api.name: pretrain
api.signature: pretrain(shard_dir: 'str | Path', run_name: 'str', model_size: 'str' = 'small', config: 'str | Path | dict[str, Any] | None' = None, runs_root: 'str | Path' = 'runs', resume: 'str | None' = None, **overrides: 'Any') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
api.summary: Pretrain a pragmatiq model on tokenized shards.

api.name: finetune
api.signature: finetune(shard_dir: 'str | Path', run: 'str | Path', label_path: 'str | Path', config: 'str | Path | dict[str, Any] | None' = None, device: 'str' = 'auto', **overrides: 'Any') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
api.summary: LoRA fine-tune a trained model's adapters + head on a label table.

api.name: embed
api.signature: embed(shard_dir: 'str | Path', run: 'str | Path', out: 'str | Path | None' = None, token_budget: 'int' = 16384, device: 'str' = 'auto') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
api.summary: Embed every user in ``shard_dir`` with a trained model.

api.name: probe
api.signature: probe(shard_dir: 'str | Path', run: 'str | Path', label_path: 'str | Path', device: 'str' = 'auto', token_budget: 'int' = 16384, seed: 'int' = 0, with_baseline: 'bool' = True, probe_model: 'str' = 'gbdt') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
api.summary: Probe a trained model on a label table; compares to a raw-count baseline.

api.name: uplift
api.signature: uplift(shard_dir: 'str | Path', run: 'str | Path', label_path: 'str | Path', device: 'str' = 'auto', token_budget: 'int' = 16384, seed: 'int' = 0, learner: 'str' = 't') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
api.summary: Evaluate communication-campaign uplift on a trained model.

api.name: gnn
api.signature: gnn(shard_dir: 'str | Path', run: 'str | Path', transfers_path: 'str | Path', aml_label_path: 'str | Path', seeds: 'tuple[int, ...]' = (0, 1, 2), device: 'str' = 'auto', epochs: 'int' = 150) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
api.summary: Run the four-arm AML GNN ablation.

api.name: quickstart
api.signature: quickstart(out: 'str | Path' = 'runs/quickstart', n_users: 'int' = 50000, seed: 'int' = 0, model_size: 'str' = 'nano', max_steps: 'int' = 400, n_workers: 'int' = 0) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
api.summary: End-to-end smoke: synth → tokenize → nano pretrain → probe.

gates.title: Acceptance check — sharding, dataset, varlen collation.
AML GNN ablation — does the learned embedding + transfer graph recover money-
Acceptance check — nano end-to-end on CPU, validate, packaging.
